title: SQS Queue
description: Fully managed message queue for decoupling services. Messages are retained until processed. Supports standard (at-least-once, best-effort ordering) and FIFO (exactly-once, strict ordering) queues.
practices: Always configure a dead-letter queue (DLQ) — messages that fail processing repeatedly need a place to land for inspection.
Use FIFO queues only when ordering matters. Standard queues have much higher throughput.
Set visibility timeout longer than your consumer's processing time, or messages get re-delivered mid-processing.
SQS is accessed via IAM, not network edges. Your compute resources need sqs:SendMessage and sqs:ReceiveMessage permissions.
configNotes: Queue name is required. FIFO queues must end with .fifo suffix.
Message retention period defaults to 4 days (max 14 days).
Visibility timeout should match your consumer's max processing time.
